response.original_title: Cast & crew IMDbPro  Barrio MMA Kid
response.overview: Two Officers are in the middle of a brutal murder investigation. There case unfolds when they find a video camera abandoned at the scene of the crime. Now the underground world of MMA fighting is unraveled as the video exposes the greed, betrayal and murder of a young kid who fought in the streets of Los Angeles for money and respect.
response.title: Cast & crew IMDbPro  Barrio MMA Kid
